GUIDE_1: Tap the block to merge it with another block of the same number.
GUIDE_2: You can merge in any direction. Tap and hold to preview the blocks that will merge.
GUIDE_3: Make a big merge to create a combo!
HAMMER_TEXT: Use hammer to remove one block
BIG_NUMBER_TEXT: You have made a big number!
AD_BREAK_TEXT: Watch a short ad and get the reward.
Rewarded Failed: Failed to get the rewarded! Please try again
WARNING_NOT_LOGIN: Login to post score to leaderboard.
WARNING_MAX_SCORE: You have reached the maximum score 2147483647. You can still play the game but the score will not be posted to the leaderboard.
MAX_SCORE_NOTIFICATION:
Welcome back! We've identified a score calculation issue.
Your best score and the leaderboard have been reset to ensure accuracy.
To apologize, 500 coins have been added to your account. Thank you for your understanding.
